feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: EC Time Off workbooks
entry.content:
Hi,

Could you please advise where I can find the latest EC Time Off configuration workbook and where i can find some demo videos or power points that we can refer to?

 

Thank You

entry.title: Are you using fonctional locations in EC ?
entry.content:
Is there some EC customers

that have designed a sub level below location organization structure ?

 

for processes like :

- recruiting 

-onboarding 

- learning

- payroll

- time management 

is it a custom object with parent relationship with location or we can use standard feature for it ?

entry.title: LOA - Manager not updated
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Direct report is on LOA(based on the right to return , position is unassigned from employee job information).In the meantime, manager of this direct report is moved to another position.

This doesn't update manager on job information of employee as he is on LOA and position is removed.

In this case , how can we  handle in updating the correct manager i.e manager's manager in Job information.

Thanks

entry.title: Rules on Benefit Claim portion reimbursement
entry.content:
Successfactors:

I have a claim set up to create the one-time payment after approval. The entitlement is 1000 but company will only pay 50% of each claim.

Scenario:

  1. 1st time, employee claims 500 -> One time payment amount to be inserted is 250. Entitlement balance must be 750. - 
  2. 2nd time, employee claims 1000. System must allow and reimburse back 750. Meaning, if the amount being claimed is bigger than the entitlement/balance, it must consume the entire balance so it becomes 0.

is it possible to set up such rules especially for #2? So far entitlement amounts are based on criteria and not previous claims

entry.title: Update Manager Position in Position Object
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We need to manually update Position Hierarchy when a manager is terminated, and we transfer direct reports in Termination activity (KBA-2796641).
I am trying to automate it using intelligent services- Change in Manager and Integration Center Job.
In Integration Center Job, there is no option to map Manager Position from Job information to Parent Position in Position (Source Entity is "EmpJob" and Target Entity "Position"). It is very high-level design only.

Kindly guide me on how to automatically update parent position in Position object for the mentioned scenario.

Thanks and Regards,
RG

entry.title: Some issues with the SuccessFactors Microsoft Teams integration
entry.content:
1. There is no real support structure in place
I am not sure if anyone else is experiencing the same issues, but there seems to be no real support structure in place for the MS Teams app. If your users have issues authenticating or issues with any of the services, it just tells the user to contact their administrator. This isn't a message we can customize, and as administrators, we can do very little to actually help the user. There are no FAQs in the implementation guide to help administrators understand the cause of basic issues. For example, we have users that cannot authenticate and get the message "The app is unavailable due to user mapping issues. Please contact your administrator for help." SAP support has been no help in resolving these issues. Our SAP reps have been no help in resolving these issues. I cannot enage my internal Teams or Azure beyond verifying my UPN without additional information. If I am seeing this as an issue in a small pilot group, how bad would it be for a global employee population? Would i be expected to raise tickets with SAP for each issue. We have also see an error that states "Unable to reach app. Please try again" Is this an issue with Teams, the bot service, azure, our network, Successfactors? How am i to know and resolve?
2. You cannot customize the list of actions shown to users, even if those actions are not available. Things like view my pay statements will be shown as an action, even if your system does not support that. There is a learn more button which for some reason redirects users to help.SAP.com, which none of our end users use
3. When you first download the app, you get a page with formatting errors

 


4. The EC quick actions don't let you bring in standard fields into some of their templates. If you use standard fields as filtering criteria, you may not be able to bring that filterable field into the change template.
5. Some of the rule types do not function
6. The quick actions also show up in the web app and you don't seem to be able to customize this. Imagine creating a quick action to view your cost center so that someone could do that in Teams without logging in, but then it clutters up this menu

Those last four are somewhat minor compared to the first two. Connecting the web application to a huge enterprise application like MS teams without having a predefined support structure and providing tools to easily fix common issues is a show stopper. Having the interaction with your end users having no customizable options, so that the app suggests services that cannot be completed. Is also a show stopper
What do other people think?

entry.title: Duplicate Claims
entry.content:
Based on this KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/2864897/E there seems to be no way of doing a duplicate lookup on claims submitted within the schedule with same attributes. My requirement is a real-time way to stop duplicate claims, at the point of submission (error message).

I have tried to write the relevant claim data in a custom MDF that has a valid-when association in the Benefit Claim object, but, the custom MDF cannot be selected in the 'Create' option under the Then block of the business rule. I'm only allowed to 'Create' composite object data. The intent was to use this standalone custom MDF as the look up table instead of the standard Claim Accumulation object.

Has anyone found a workaround on this that won't involve any integration?

entry.title: Integration Framework for Onboarding Compliance Forms From Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll integration exists for UK Starter Checklist and Australia Tax File Number (TFN). Does the integration exist for the US W4 form?

entry.title: Attachment deleted when HR Admin updating
entry.content: When doing a legal name change or termination where a manager for example has added an attachment. When the HR admin is doing a check and clicking update the attachment is getting deleted which it should not be.

entry.title: to be deleted..
entry.content: ss

entry.title: Issue related to User ID mapping from EC to ECC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a situation, in Employee Central  User id  is  generated as M10001765, how can we map it with existing employee ID in ECC (SAP HCM) which is 8 digit numeric number  62763465.

Also, when new employee is hired in EC its will have new employee id started with M1XXXXXX  then how we map and replicate the new User id  in ECC (SAP HCM).

Please suggest

entry.title: Difference between Job Function and Job Family in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How do the following differ: Job Function in Employee Central which is created via Admin Center > Manage Data > Create 'Job Function'

vs

Job Family, Job Roles created in Admin Center > Manage Job Profile Content

We know the relationship between Job Family > Job Roles > Job Codes > Positions > Employee, and how it works. 

My Query is what is the relationship of Job Function to the above? 

In other words, what guidelines should a customer follow to decide which is a Job Function or which is a Job Family.

Regards,

JP

entry.title: Time Off Recruit Rule: Rounding up in 0.5s
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a problem in Time Management I cant get quite right. Our company keeps a rather simple system for time off, just assigning Days to be booked at half or full increments. 

We are flexible for new joiners and try to round up when their time off is in the form of a decimal place. For example, our full balance is 26 days for the year, and when someone joins the system will take 15.2 and default up to 16 for example. In reality, it would be more appropriate to get it to 15.5.

AIs there some way to get the rounding to be more to 0.5 as to +1?

Thank you,

entry.title: Not able to cascade a picklist ( State & City )
entry.content:
Hi , I am a beginner and trying to work around "How to cascade a Picklist" but while doing so the below error is throwing : 

Casescenario :

Step 1 : 2 Picklist created ( State as Parent and City as Child with Picklist values )

Step 2 : Both the Picklist assigned to MDF object ( Business Unit ) 

Step 3 : While cascading Picklist the below error is reflecting , dont know why ?

Looking for support

entry.title: User unable to export the paystub to PDF using an iPad/iOS device.
entry.content:
Hi Community

We have an issue with paystub.

One user is unable to export his paytub to PDF using an iPad/iOS device, he can do it using a laptop or a computer, but he is traveeling and he needs to be able usin his iPad.

Do you know what could be the issue?

We already confirm he has all the requiered permissions.

Thanks.

entry.title: I have empty values for LTI. They are still being published as a record in Compensation Info Portlet
entry.content: I have empty values for LTI. They are still being published as a record in Compensation Info Portlet. Empty values were not in the past. Is this normal? Did something change?

entry.title: HRA pay component value as amount .
entry.content:
Hi Seniors 

Please help me with the below query .

HRA pay component type is " Percentage " which is 40% of Basic pay but in UI screen wanted see sum of 40% only

HRA needs to be shown as a sum instead of a percentage

entry.title: Job profile management
entry.content:
Hello,
for the management of job profiles, we would like to manage the following two activities automatically:
1) automatic addition of a list of competencies when creating a new job profile
2) creation of a custom table to be saved in SSFF and this to be used to populate the competencies rating information according to the professional family of the role linked to the job profile

does anyone know of a way of handling this request? could the integration centre help, or is it necessary to use other tools?

thanks

entry.title: Benefits Open Enrollment "Edit" action goes to the workflow directly without reaching the cart
entry.content:
While configuring the Open Enrollment for Global benefits, the New enrollment selections are being added to the cart without any issues.

However, for those benefits which are being carried over, the "Edit" transaction doesn't let you add the changes to the cart but instead trigger a workflow directly. Is there a way to make it add to the cart and tie it to a cart workflow?

entry.title: Calling APIs from S/4 to SF/EC using Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are working in a project in which we need to do API calls (post and gets) from S/4 to SuccessFactors/Employee Central(SF/EC).
We have a BTP account already set, with Cloud Connector already configured and CPI as well (this last one will be used to replicate data from SF/EC to S/4).
Client has some security concerns when it comes to the usage of direct API calls from S/4 to SF/EC ( he says that he is afraid of getting hacked and so, does not want to expose the API calls, we wants to "hide" the API calls to the outside), so, he requested us to use Cloud Connector when communicating between S/4 and SF/EC.
I have searched and could not find a way to make use of the Cloud Connector, when it comes to API calls from S/4 to SF/EC (EC will be the server in this case).
Could anyone advise if it's possible to use Cloud Connector for this purpose?
If not, can anyone propose any other approach (using CPI as a middleware and creating a Proxy there, for example)?
Thank you in advance.

PS: I have limited knowledge when it comes to BASIS/Integration Topics.
